case_title: AHN, BEVERLY VS KAPLAN PHILLIP IND & DBA BOND CLEANERS

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KAPLAN PHILLIP IND & DBA BOND CLEANERS
CERT. RECEIPT TO PHILLIP KAPLAN RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AHN, BEVERLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAPLAN PHILLIP IND & DBA BOND CLEANERS $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $120.00, PLAINTIFF TO KEEP THE GARMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY AHN, BEVERLY AS TO DEFENDANT KAPLAN PHILLIP IND & DBA BOND CLEANERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-1993 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
